creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #17)
> Tarball updated
Could you ask your release engineer to prepare *conventionally named* source tarball?  E.g., ${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}.tar.bz2 or something similar, but with embedded version, so distfiles for different versions can coexist and be cacheable?

> .git removed from tarball!
Then why the need for EXTRACT_AFTER_ARGS hack? :)  But anyway, this had been cooking for too long, I don't want to delay it further and would commit something tonight, given it's now required by the KTX.
